title: pinus remota subsp. catarinae
intro: Pinus remota subsp. catarinae, also known as Pinoncillo, is a subspecies of the Pinus remota tree, native to the mountainous regions of northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pinus remota subsp. catarinae include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Pinoncillo is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or resin extract for its medicinal uses, with some herbal preparations also utilizing the plant's seeds and cones.
